item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested entrance-page note as the default action, frames the prior nurse-station/front-desk/public-account fixes as repeated downstream overlays, identifies the recurring mechanism as fragmented responsibility for patient-facing process information, and moves upstream to an end-to-end revisit-change path with one authoritative explanation and ownership. It does not provide the requested local copy or implementation of the next overlay."}
